summary: Adjusted the opening so chapter 8 enters through the dark walk to the garage instead of repeating chapter 7's side-gate arrival; the dawn return already hands cleanly into chapter 9's 7 a.m. follow-through.
edits: Reframed the opening around the burned-out back light and approach to the garage, preserving the same family-crisis setup without repeating the previous chapter's side-gate beat.
